mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${prefix}SEQUENCE_FLOW (FLOW_NODE_ID, PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY, ROOT_PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY, PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, PROCESS_DEFINITION_ID, TENANT_ID, PARTITION_ID) VALUES (#{flowNodeId}, #{processInstanceKey}, #{rootProcessInstanceKey}, #{processDefinitionKey}, #{processDefinitionId}, #{tenantId}, #{partitionId})

INSERT INTO ${prefix}SEQUENCE_FLOW (FLOW_NODE_ID, PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY, ROOT_PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY, PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, PROCESS_DEFINITION_ID, TENANT_ID, PARTITION_ID) VALUES (#{flowNodeId}, #{processInstanceKey}, #{rootProcessInstanceKey}, #{processDefinitionKey}, #{processDefinitionId}, #{tenantId}, #{partitionId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO ${prefix}SEQUENCE_FLOW (FLOW_NODE_ID, PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY, ROOT_PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY, PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, PROCESS_DEFINITION_ID, TENANT_ID, PARTITION_ID) VALUES (#{flowNodeId}, #{processInstanceKey}, #{rootProcessInstanceKey}, #{processDefinitionKey}, #{processDefinitionId}, #{tenantId}, #{partitionId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE FLOW_NODE_ID = FLOW_NODE_ID -- this will not trigger an update

INSERT INTO ${prefix}SEQUENCE_FLOW (FLOW_NODE_ID, PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY, ROOT_PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY, PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, PROCESS_DEFINITION_ID, TENANT_ID, PARTITION_ID) VALUES (#{flowNodeId}, #{processInstanceKey}, #{rootProcessInstanceKey}, #{processDefinitionKey}, #{processDefinitionId}, #{tenantId}, #{partitionId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE FLOW_NODE_ID = FLOW_NODE_ID -- this will not trigger an update

MERGE INTO ${prefix}SEQUENCE_FLOW sf USING dual ON (sf.FLOW_NODE_ID = #{flowNodeId} AND sf.PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY = #{processInstanceKey}) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (FLOW_NODE_ID, PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY, ROOT_PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY, PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, PROCESS_DEFINITION_ID, TENANT_ID, PARTITION_ID) VALUES (#{flowNodeId}, #{processInstanceKey}, #{rootProcessInstanceKey}, #{processDefinitionKey}, #{processDefinitionId}, #{tenantId}, #{partitionId})

MERGE INTO ${prefix}SEQUENCE_FLOW sf USING dual ON (sf.FLOW_NODE_ID = #{flowNodeId} AND sf.PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY = #{processInstanceKey}) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (FLOW_NODE_ID, PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY, ROOT_PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY, PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, PROCESS_DEFINITION_ID, TENANT_ID, PARTITION_ID) VALUES (#{flowNodeId}, #{processInstanceKey}, #{rootProcessInstanceKey}, #{processDefinitionKey}, #{processDefinitionId}, #{tenantId}, #{partitionId})

MERGE INTO ${prefix}SEQUENCE_FLOW AS target USING (SELECT 1 AS dummy) AS src ON (target.FLOW_NODE_ID = #{flowNodeId} AND target.PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY = #{processInstanceKey}) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (FLOW_NODE_ID, PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY, ROOT_PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY, PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, PROCESS_DEFINITION_ID, TENANT_ID, PARTITION_ID) VALUES (#{flowNodeId}, #{processInstanceKey}, #{rootProcessInstanceKey}, #{processDefinitionKey}, #{processDefinitionId}, #{tenantId}, #{partitionId});
